titleStmt.title: SII 29.219: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 219. (A.R. No. B. 764 of 1962-63.) GORṬA, BHALKI TALUK, BIDAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab built into the platform of Harijana-Chāvaḍi.

It registers a gift of one load of millets daily for offerings to the god Kuṁbhēra and oil for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple by sēnabōva Gangarasa and sāvāsi Māṇikabhaṭṭa, the perggaḍe of Bhaṭṭavēnṭheya dandanāyaka sāvāsi Pommaṇayya.

The record is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 37, Nandana Pushya, Śu. 4, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa. It corresponds to 1112 A.D., December 24, Tuesday. The Sankramana was on 23, Monday but the tithi was śu. 3.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmaccāḷukya vikramava
risada 37 nēya naṁdana saṁ
vatsarada puśya sudda 4 sōma
vāra Uttarāyaṇa
saṁkramaṇadaṁdu bhaṭṭavēṁṭhe
ya daṇḍanāekaṁ sāvāsi pommaṇa
yyaṁgaḷa perggaḍe sāvāsi
māṇikabhaṭṭanuṁ sēnabō
va gaṁgarasanu vīḷdarmma kuṁbhē
ra dēvara nivēdyakaṁ sādave(ṇṇe)
gaṁ dēvasavaḷa maṁḍavaḍalu
biṭṭa jōḷada hēṟu Oṁdu .
Ī dhammavaṁ matte manthāvakka pikā
gaḷāgi yāru baṁpadaṁtappi
pratipāḷisuvaru . vakra
rāgi kiḍisidavaru vāraṇā
yalu sahasra kavile vaṁ
hmaṇaruvaṁ koṁda pātaka
kku © .
Digital edition of SII 29.219 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
